meta_title: 5 First-Time Puppy Owner Mistakes to Avoid | Curious Tails
meta_description: The five mistakes first-time puppy owners in Singapore actually make, from real placements: choosing by photo, skipping the routine, rescue-cuddling at 2am, and more.
h1: 5 First-Time Puppy Owner Mistakes to Avoid
answer_capsule: The five mistakes we see most: choosing a breed by photo instead of routine, buying gear before understanding the puppy, breaking the night routine with 2am rescues, over-socialising in chaotic bursts, and treating week-one whimpering as an emergency. All five are preventable with a routine and someone to call.
outline: mistake 1: photo over routine (Andrew Mak story)
mistake 5: panicking at normal week-one behaviour
first_party: Andrew Mak case study (consent yes); contrarian view: routine + someone to call; failure lesson framing.
